topics.label: Space Systems
topics.description: Space chemistry, orbital analogies, microgravity fluids, and resource-management concepts with explicit claim boundaries.

topics.label: Materials and Chemistry
topics.description: Chemistry-native CLI work, molecular AI targets, lattice materials, and component-level research packets.

topics.label: Autonomy and Swarms
topics.description: Agent training, drone autonomy patterns, swarm coordination, and governed task execution.

topics.label: AI Governance
topics.description: Evidence receipts, alignment gates, benchmark claims, safety boundaries, and audit trails.

topics.label: Language and Code Systems
topics.description: Sacred Tongues, token maps, coding systems, reversible encodings, and CLI-native representation work.

topics.label: Life Systems
topics.description: Reserved topic lane for plants, animals, bio-inspired systems, ecological routing, and biology-facing research packets.

papers.title: Magneto-Triboelectric Fluid Cell Research Compendium
papers.subtitle: Literature-backed prototype rationale for a hybrid electromagnetic, triboelectric, and multi-fluid energy-harvesting cell.
papers.status: AI-assisted literature synthesis; integrated hardware unproven.
papers.review_model: AI-assisted synthesis with source/provenance caveat; citation-by-citation verification still required.
papers.claim_boundary: Use as a staged prototype rationale, not as proof of a flight-ready or commercially validated device.
papers.abstract: This packet evaluates whether adjacent published work in electromagnetic harvesters, triboelectric nanogenerators, ferrofluids, liquid metals, microgravity fluids, and power-management circuits is enough to justify a staged M-TEF prototype program.

papers.title: Chemistry-Native CLI and Space Chemistry Systems
papers.subtitle: A governed command-line evidence room for chemistry, space chemistry, and external scientific engine bridges.
papers.review_model: Initial source mapping and claim-boundary pass.
papers.claim_boundary: Does not claim official NASA, RDKit, Open Babel, ASE, or DeepChem compatibility until bridges are implemented and verified.
papers.abstract: SCBE should not claim to replace established chemistry engines. The stronger claim is a governed chemistry-native CLI lane that can route scientific tools, preserve receipts, and separate private proof from public evidence.

papers.title: Drone Autonomy Training Patterns for SCBE Agent Training
papers.subtitle: Mapping public autonomy-program patterns onto coding-agent gates, simulations, and promotion tiers.
papers.status: Public-pattern synthesis; not a physical drone capability claim.
papers.review_model: Public program pattern synthesis with software-agent mapping.
papers.claim_boundary: Use as an analogy and training-loop design pattern for software agents, not as a claim of drone operation or certification.
papers.abstract: Government autonomy work tends to progress through simulation, test ranges, trust calibration, runtime assurance, live demonstrations, and repair loops. That structure maps cleanly onto SCBE agent training and receipt-backed promotion.

papers.title: Layered-Lattice Molecular AI: Beatable Targets
papers.subtitle: A narrow competitive lane for robust molecular reasoning under topology loss, activity cliffs, and explanation pressure.
papers.review_model: Competitive landscape and failure-mode pass; benchmark validation still needed.
papers.claim_boundary: Does not claim benchmark superiority until tested against established chemistry and molecular-ML suites.
papers.abstract: The beatable target is not every molecular AI task. It is robust compound reasoning where topology, descriptors, fragments, spectra, literature, and claim boundaries must remain visible.

papers.title: GeoSeed Orbital Model
papers.subtitle: A deterministic geometry analogy connecting Sacred Tongues, orbital shells, and hyperbolic radial spacing.
papers.status: Implemented deterministic analogy, not quantum-chemistry simulation.
papers.review_model: Implementation-backed analogy with explicit non-physics boundary.
papers.claim_boundary: Do not present as real electron-orbital computation.
papers.abstract: This note preserves an orbital pattern as a GeoSeed model: six tongues as shells, a phi ladder as hyperbolic radial depth, and uniform shell gaps as a deterministic structural invariant.

papers.title: Task-Autonomous Fabrication Cell Tech Tree
papers.subtitle: A build-sense-correct loop for governed fabrication workflows inside a human-specified goal envelope.
papers.status: R&D stepping-stone note and build queue seed.
papers.review_model: Concept stress-test with unsafe claims fenced before publication.
papers.claim_boundary: Not a canonical SCBE production commitment and not a claim of unbounded physical autonomy.
papers.abstract: A task-autonomous fabrication cell receives a human-specified target, decomposes it into build steps, dispatches tools under governance, senses results, corrects its model, and emits receipts for physical actions.

papers.title: Wolfram Token Map
papers.subtitle: A language and code-system research note for symbolic token structure.
papers.review_model: Representation note; not yet through source and validation passes.
papers.claim_boundary: Use as representation research, not as a claim of Wolfram-system compatibility.
papers.abstract: A symbolic-token mapping note that belongs in the language and code systems lane of the research database.

papers.title: Space Life-Support Animals, Husbandry, and Micro-Energy Concepts
papers.subtitle: A research scaffold for animal husbandry, habitat telemetry, welfare boundaries, and micro-energy recovery in long-duration space systems.
papers.status: Research Brief scaffold; sources and validation passes still needed.
papers.review_model: Framer pass complete; source scout, welfare review, physics budget, and red-team passes required before stronger publication.
papers.claim_boundary: Does not claim animals can meaningfully power a spacecraft, does not recommend animal use, and makes no legal, welfare-certification, mission-readiness, or patentability claim.
papers.abstract: This packet turns a speculative animal-husbandry and micro-energy idea into a falsifiable space-systems research question with a required source ledger, validation plan, welfare boundary, and red-team path.

papers.title: Self-Bounding Systems and Relational Ontology
papers.subtitle: Mapping four informal claims about boundaries, observation, and fundamental relationships onto their formal counterparts in physics and mathematics.
papers.status: Research Brief; source ledger drafted from model memory, citation verification pending.
papers.review_model: Framer + source scout + partial domain skeptic passes complete; passes 4-10 pending for packet promotion.
papers.claim_boundary: Claims only that the informal statements have identifiable formal counterparts with stated statuses and that the container-cosmology variant is observationally excluded; asserts no new physical theory.
papers.abstract: Four informally stated claims - systems self-generate their boundaries, boundaries are relational rather than intrinsic, definition is co-created by measurement, and relations are the fundamental layer - are mapped onto self-bounding spacetimes, horizon relativity, it-from-bit and relational quantum mechanics, and ontic structural realism, with each component classified as settled physics, live research, or open philosophy.
